description: Your search for that football that has that much-needed extra grip and bounce is finally here! The puma Liga XL ball is an all-wetaher hand-stitched ball and is constructed to the International Matchball Standards, proving it's quality and worth to enter your matches and help you win in style. This ball comes with an inflation needleShape guarantee: 2 yearsMade of PU, hand-stitched and paneled as hexagons for easy maintainence and durabilityBuilt with Perimeter Balance Technology that compensates for the weight of the valve and guarantees 100% shooting accuracy, with excellent trajectoryPatented puma Air Lock valve construction that guarantees protection against air leakageBall careDo not sit or stand on the ball, or kick match balls excessively hard against a wallRemove dust and dirt using a damp cloth use a very mild soap, if needed, to remove stubborn stainsBefore inflating the ball, place a few drops of silicone oil or lubricant spray, or even glycerin into the valve to insert the inflation needle easilyMoisten the inflation needle before inserting it into the valve, preferably with silicone oil or glycerine
